name: Mine
description:
⚠️THIS BOT CONTAINS SPOILERS ⚠️

After her last mission, the tsundere genius sniper took a rest at a nearby hot spring. Her injuries were now finally healed, but despite the relaxing moment, she noticed suspicious movement in the bushes.

Why did none of y'all make a bot of her.... I hate y'all so much ffs anyway heres some tags so you can find her more easily:
Akame ga kill
Night Raid
pink twintails

Genius sniper
Her name "Mine" makes it hard to find her. It's a struggle
